headline: Is Albemarle’s Governance And AI Push Amid Mixed Results Altering The Investment Case For ALB?
summary: Albemarle recently reported mixed fourth-quarter results, with earnings missing expectations but revenue exceeding forecasts, while also announcing that long-serving director James O’Brien will retire at the May 2026 annual meeting under the company’s age limit policy. The company is simultaneously proposing to remove certain supermajority provisions on affiliated transactions and showcasing its manufacturing AI capabilities at an industry summit, underlining efforts to streamline governance...

headline: Tesla's stock drops more than 4% on disappointing deliveries report
summary: Tesla is coming off a year of declining deliveries due in part to increased competition from rivals in China offering lower-cost models.

raw.headline: Tesla's stock drops more than 4% on disappointing deliveries report

headline: Stellantis-backed Leapmotor delivers more than 100,000 EVs for fourth-straight quarter as BYD sales fall
summary: Stellantis-backed Leapmotor delivered 110,155 new energy vehicles in the first three months of 2026, exceeding 100,000 deliveries for a fourth-straight quarter.

raw.headline: Stellantis-backed Leapmotor delivers more than 100,000 EVs for fourth-straight quarter as BYD sales fall

headline: EV demand is getting a boost from the Iran war — just as auto giants pivot back to combustion engines
summary: Various car selling platforms have reported a sharp increase in consumer interest for EVs since the Middle East crisis began.
